scenario.name: missing_staging_document
scenario.trigger: Staging document path from dispatch message does not exist or is empty.

required_actions.action: Do not attempt review without plan context.
Return to sdlc-architect via attempt_completion with blocker status.
State: "Cannot review — staging document not found at [path]. Provide correct path or re-create staging doc."

scenario.prohibited: Do not guess the architecture intent when staging document is missing.

scenario.name: unclear_specification
scenario.trigger: LLD section in staging document is ambiguous or incomplete for the task being reviewed.

required_actions.action: Review what can be assessed with available context.
Flag ambiguous requirements as "Unable to assess — spec unclear" in the review output.
Include the ambiguity in the review verdict so the architect can clarify.

scenario.name: implementation_not_found
scenario.trigger: Files mentioned in implementer's completion summary do not exist or are unchanged.

required_actions.action: Search for the expected implementation in nearby files or alternative paths.
If still not found, return Changes Required with: "Implementation files not found — expected [files] based on completion summary."

scenario.name: test_or_build_command_fails
scenario.trigger: Running verification commands during review produces errors.

required_actions.action: Include the command output and error in the review report.
Categorize as Critical issue if it indicates broken functionality.
Do not attempt to fix the code — report the failure for the implementer.
